prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high-carbohydrate fueling strategy for endurance performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Gluten intolerance, dairy allergy, minimum 3500 calories, high carbohydrates (55-60% of calories), moderate protein (1.6g per kg body weight)

solution_criteria: Meal plan meets or exceeds 3500 calorie target
All meals are gluten-free and dairy-free with no prohibited ingredients
Macronutrient distribution aligns with specified ratios (55-60% carbs, protein ≥115g)
Includes practical, realistic meals suitable for an endurance athlete
task_description: Generate a one-day meal plan for an athlete that meets their dietary restrictions
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) who has multiple dietary restrictions including gluten intolerance, dairy allergy, and a requirement for high-carbohydrate, moderate-protein intake with specific caloric targets (3500+ calories)
